PVT Sensor

Absolute Address:
Base Offset:
0x50b00000
Size:
0x18
Source:
pvt_rf.rdl

Description

Process/Voltage/Temperature sensor. Supports temperature mode and voltage mode. Operating voltage: 0.8V digital, 1.8V analog. Temperature range: -40C to 125C; accuracy +-1C trimmed, +-6C untrimmed. Voltage accuracy: +-3% (3-sigma). Sample rate: 3000 samples/sec. Usage: set REG_PVT_MODE, set REG_PVT_ENA=1, wait for interrupt, read REG_PVT_DATA, write REG_PVT_INT=2 to clear.

Contents

Offset Identifier Name
0x03 - -
0x04 pvt_trim PVT Trim
0x08 pvt_mode PVT Mode
0x0C pvt_ena PVT Enable
0x10 pvt_int PVT Interrupt
0x14 pvt_data PVT Data
